hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess,shutil,os; f=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); t=shutil.which('trunk') or os.path.expanduser('~/.cache/trunk/launcher/trunk'); f and os.path.exists(t) and subprocess.run([t,'fmt','--force',f],stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)" 2>/dev/null || true
